The '''Library of the Republic''' was a massive [[Library/Legends|library]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], and the official data repository of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. After the formation of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], its [[Special Acquisitions Branch]] was merged into [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]].

==Appearances==
